analysis_commentary: grad_clip 30→20 collapsed: max reached 1.0 by probe ~20 (t=324s) and held through end, illegal=1.0 throughout, aboveU=0. max_grad_global_norm still peaked at 103.7 (exceeded 100 alarm) — tighter clip didn't prevent spikes, just rescaled them after the fact. The new lr_warmup_steps=0 / sqrt_batch_scaling flags (both false) were inactive, so this run was effectively identical to prior behavior.
